18.sourceTitle: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - Amazon.com
18.evidenceText: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - Utilizes Clik Valves for best-in-class performance
18.extractionRationale: Only one third-party accessory product is explicitly mentioned in the evidence: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit, which is specifically designed for Clik Valve. The evidence does not mention additional pump heads, adapters, or tools compatible with Clik valve.

37.sourceTitle: CoreCap Valve Cap Set - BBB Cycling
37.evidenceText: Product information Features Size guide Specifications Spare parts Find a dealer. [Section header present but no detailed spare parts list provided]
37.extractionRationale: The evidence mentions a "Spare parts" section but provides no specific count or list of distinct replacement/spare part SKUs (valve cores, seals, o-rings, replacement kits). Source 2 lists 2 main product variants but these are not spare parts. No numerical count of distinct SKUs can be extracted from the provided evidence.

45.evidenceText: All DT Swiss wheelsets are tubeless compatible and the ASM versions come tubeless ready, equipped with tubeless tape and valves. The DT Swiss tubeless valve perfectly matches DT Swiss rims.
45.extractionRationale: The provided sources only reference DT Swiss's proprietary tubeless valve technology with no mention of Clik valve adoption by DT Swiss or any of the other major brands (Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, Roval). No evidence supports that any brand has adopted Clik as standard in 2026/2027 product lines.

57.evidenceText: Product listing pages for BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Valve Core variants. No stock status, availability dates, or restock turnaround information found in any of the three sources provided.
57.extractionRationale: The sources contain only product information and variant options. No evidence of stock status, "back in stock" dates, or restock turnaround metrics is present in any of the provided content. Cannot extract a numeric value without direct evidence of stock status or restocking timelines.
